app.name: Echo Map
app.tagline: A sound map of your life

empty.title: Your map is quiet
empty.description: Record your first echo to light it up.

empty.title: No echoes yet
empty.description: The sounds you save will gather here, oldest memories and all.

slide1.title: Keep the sounds of your life
slide1.body: Not photos — the hum of a café, waves on a beach, a laugh you don't want to forget.

slide2.title: Record and pin in one tap
slide2.body: Capture a moment and we'll tag it to the place it happened.

slide3.title: Hear it again, years later
slide3.body: Open the map and tap a pin to return to that exact moment.

microphone.title: Microphone
microphone.body: Echo Map needs your microphone to record the sounds you choose to keep.

location.title: Location
location.body: We tag each recording with its place so you can find it on the map. Location is used only while you record.

capture.notePlaceholder: What do you want to remember?
